statement: For every admissible carrier C there exists alpha > 0 such that for all sufficiently large lambda, H(O_lambda | T_C(lambda)) >= alpha * dim(O_lambda).
rank_form: rank(Im(C_lambda -> O_lambda)) <= (1 - alpha) * dim(O_lambda) for all sufficiently large lambda.
boundary: Statement and verifier only; does not prove the Depth Bridge, Chronos-RR closure, H4.1/FGL closure, or P vs NP.
